candidate_llm_application: WANDJINA-MOUTHLESS-FT: output-head-only surface-form suppression FT with hidden-state preservation loss + null-token emission (no refusal substitution)

independent_scores.title: LLM Ghostbusters: Surgical Hallucination Suppression via Adaptive Unlearning (2026/05)
independent_scores.rationale: Surgical suppression + utility preservation + target-only distribution change is direct functional twin of output-head-only surface-form suppression with hidden-state preservation.

independent_scores.title: Surgical Knowledge Rewrite Unlearn-then-Learn IA3 (2025/08)
kw_matched_terms: surface-form output suppression FT (forget old fact)
independent_scores.rationale: Circuit-localized IA3 PEFT is functionally the same surgical suppression + preservation paradigm.

independent_scores.title: LLM Surgery Efficient Knowledge Unlearning Editing (2024/09)
independent_scores.rationale: KL-divergence retain term is functionally equivalent to hidden-state preservation loss; reverse-gradient is surface-form suppression.

independent_scores.title: From Logits to Latents: Contrastive Representation Shaping LLM Unlearning (2026/01)
independent_scores.rationale: Contrastive representation shaping for unlearning while preserving general reps matches both surface suppression and hidden-state preservation.

independent_scores.title: Just Enough Shifts: Targeted Representation FT (ICLR 2026)
independent_scores.rationale: Candidate itself cites this as prior art. Targeted FT for selective suppression without over-refusal covers WANDJINA's core.

independent_scores.title: Steering the CensorShip Representation Vectors (2025/04)
independent_scores.rationale: Activation-vector censorship preserving internal representations is functionally the same outcome.

independent_scores.title: Clear Minds Think Alike: Token Perplexity Robust FT (2025/01)
kw_matched_terms: surface-form output suppression FT (selective token masking)
independent_scores.rationale: Selective Token Masking at training is a form of surface-form suppression; semantic cosine clears 0.7 threshold.

independent_scores.title: Understanding Overrefusal LLMs (EMNLP 2025)
independent_scores.rationale: Over-refusal analysis documents the exact preserved-internals + suppressed-output asymmetry WANDJINA encodes; clears semantic and functional thresholds.

summary.agreement_with_upstream: matches 06_5 and 06_7 within tolerance; no scoring drift; verdict identical

reason: 8 independent hits >= 1 threshold. Mechanism is well-covered by existing surgical-suppression / unlearning-with-preservation literature (Ghostbusters, IA3 Rewrite, LLM Surgery, Logits-to-Latents, Just Enough Shifts, CensorShip steering, Token Masking, Overrefusal analysis). Combination claim (output-head-only + hidden-state freeze + null-token emission) is too minor to escape prior art.
